---
title: "Mentoring"
---

<div style="max-width: 1200px; margin: 40px auto;">

I have had the opportunity to mentor high school interns and undergraduate students in mechanical design, CAD,
3D printing / digital fabrication, and robotics. This included hands-on training on the Prusa, Carbon M1, and Stratasys J750 3D printers,
Instron material testing system, as well as design for additive manufacturing and Python programming.

**Yusef (Joe) Torky** - High School Intern, Transformative Robotics Lab, University of Washington — Summer 2022

**Nathan Zhang** - High School Intern, Transformative Robotics Lab, University of Washington — Summer 2022

**Natalie Paskett** - Bachelor of Applied Science, Engineering, Oregon State University — Winter 2025

</div>
